# Dependencies

<!-- Generated by /caveman-docs:ai-context. Manual edits overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### External services

| Service | Role | Notes |
|---------|------|-------|
| None | — | Plugin is fully local; no network calls |

### Runtime dependencies

| Dep | Source | Used by |
|-----|--------|---------|
| Node.js | System | All 3 hook scripts; settings.json mutation in `install.sh` |
| Bash | System (POSIX) | `hooks/install.sh`, `hooks/uninstall.sh` |
| Node stdlib `fs` | Built-in | Flag file, settings.json read/write |
| Node stdlib `path` | Built-in | Cross-platform path join |
| Node stdlib `os` | Built-in | `homedir()` fallback when `CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR` unset |

No npm packages installed. `hooks/package.json` declares `"type": "commonjs"` only.

### Internal libraries

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `hooks/caveman-docs-activate.js` | SessionStart emitter; reads `skills/caveman-docs/SKILL.md`, strips frontmatter, prefixes banner |
| `hooks/caveman-docs-tracker.js` | UserPromptSubmit detector; 12 intent regexes, 9 exemption regexes, 3 deactivation regexes |
| `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js` | PreToolUse matcher; 9 AI-doc path regexes, 3 human-doc exemption regexes |
| `hooks/install.sh` | Copies files into `~/.claude/{hooks,commands,skills,agents}`; atomic settings.json mutation with `.bak` |
| `hooks/uninstall.sh` | Reverses install; removes caveman-docs hook entries |
| `skills/caveman-docs/SKILL.md` | Compression ruleset; source of truth read by `caveman-docs-activate.js` |
| `agents/doc-compressor.md` | Worker spec; dispatches on `scope ∈ {init, full, compress}` |
| `commands/{init,ai-context,compress}.md` | Slash-command routers |

### Shared infrastructure (Claude Code harness)

| Surface | Path | Role |
|---------|------|------|
| Hooks dir | `~/.claude/hooks/caveman-docs/` | Install target for 3 `.js` + `package.json` |
| Commands dir | `~/.claude/commands/caveman-docs/` | Install target for 3 `.md` routers |
| Skill dir | `~/.claude/skills/caveman-docs/` | Install target for `SKILL.md` |
| Agents dir | `~/.claude/agents/` | Install target for `doc-compressor.md` |
| Settings | `~/.claude/settings.json` | Hook registration sink |
